headline: The Campbell’s Company (CPB) Names Joshua Levine Chief Investor Relations Officer
summary: The Campbell’s Company (NASDAQ:CPB) is one of the best NASDAQ stocks under $30 to buy. On March 13, The Campbell’s Company appointed Joshua Levine as Chief Investor Relations Officer, effective March 18. Reporting to Chief Financial Officer Todd Cunfer, Levine will lead the company’s engagement with the investment community and manage shareholder communications. He succeeds […]

headline: Campbell's Stock: Is CPB Underperforming the Consumer Staples Sector?
summary: Campbell's has considerably underperformed the broader consumer staples sector over the past year, and analysts are cautious about the stock’s prospects.

headline: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks We’re Skeptical Of
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.
